# Image Optimization Skill

## Auto-Load When

- adding product imagery, marketing visuals, icons, logos, or media sections

## Rules

- provide intrinsic dimensions
- use responsive sizing deliberately
- keep decorative images out of assistive output
- avoid shipping oversized assets

## Checklist

- width and height known
- alt text purposeful or empty when decorative
- priority used only for above-the-fold essentials
- image source quality appropriate to layout

## Best Practices

- compress source assets before import
- reserve space to prevent layout shift
- prefer SVG for simple vector graphics
